attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT              ,
  'PRODUCT_CCW'  DV_MEASURE_NAME,
  WI.BK_MEASURE_NAME                            ,
  WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                     ,
  WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS RSTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
  WI.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT ,
  'R' AS DV_RSTD_ACTUAL_FLG ,
  WI.PRODUCT_KEY                      ,
  WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                  ,
  WI.SRC_ENTITY_NAME                              ,
  WI.BK_DEAL_ID                           ,
  WI.ERP_DEAL_ID,
  WI.BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT                 ,
  WI.SERVICE_FLG                        ,
  RECOGNIZED_REV_USD_AMT        ,
  BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT           ,
  PROJECTED_REV_USD_AMT         ,
  PROJECTED_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
  USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,	
  'UNKNOWN' AS RECOGNIZE_OR_PROJECTED_TYPE_CD,      
  WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
  WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
  XCAT_FLG                      ,
  RECURRING_OFFER_FLG          ,
  BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME          ,
  ELA_FLG ,
  DV_BEGINNING_BLNCE_REV_USD_AMT,
  0 DV_BRIDGE_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
  0 REMAINING_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
  WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  WI.POB_TYPE_CD ,
  WI.PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG      ,
  WI.DEFERRAL_REV_USD_AMT  ,
  CAST (
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999))AS VARCHAR(70)) AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM  OFFER CARVE OUT CHANGE */
  ,'=' AS NET_PRICE_FLG
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_DEFREV_CCW_TRNGLTD WI
  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  FISCAL_PUB
  ON FISCAL_PUB.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT
  
  INNER JOIN 
  ( SELECT FISCAL_QTR_AGE,MAX(FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT) FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT13  FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  GROUP BY 1) RF
  ON  FISCAL_PUB.FISCAL_QTR_AGE -12  = RF.FISCAL_QTR_AGE  
  
  AND   WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  <= RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT13
